summary: A silver SUV is traveling on a multi-laned road with trees lining both sides. A white sedan crashes into the SUV, causing significant damage to the front of the white sedan.

events_timeline.event: A silver SUV travels along a multi-laned road, followed closely by a white sedan.

uncertainties: The severity of the crash is unclear due to limited visibility.
Damage to the white sedan is only partially visible.

risk_assessment.why: The crash results in significant damage to the white sedan, indicating a high-risk situation.
